Coach.title: Coach
Coach.description: A trainer who manages multiple athletes.

Athlete.title: Athlete
Athlete.description: An athlete managed by a coach, containing their performance data.

coachId.description: UID of the coach managing this athlete

athleteUid.description: Anonymous UID of the athlete once they claim this profile. Null initially.

accessCode.description: The unique code used to access this profile (also the document ID)

userData.description: The athlete's performance and cycle data (JSON serialized or nested object)

Exercise.title: Exercise
Exercise.description: A custom exercise defined by a coach.

coaches/{coachId}/exercises/{exerciseId}.description: Stores custom exercises for a coach.

athletes/{athleteId}.description: Stores athlete profiles and their performance data. The document ID is the accessCode.
